programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dancing with Death
programme.desc: Wife and mother of three Stephanie Roller Bruner has a wonderful life, so her disappearance days before Thanksgiving leads to a massive search. When information of a secret love triangle comes out, the case takes a drastic turn.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Cold Blue Blood
programme.desc: Dr. Dirk Greineder is one of the most respected men in the upper class community of Wellesley, Massachusetts… that is, until a secret X-rated addiction spirals out of control and results in a gruesome murder no one saw coming.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Suburban Secrets
programme.desc: When doting mother, Cheryl Coker, vanishes from Riverside, Ohio on October 2nd 2018 numerous search efforts come up empty. But as police take a closer look at the case, they uncover some disturbing information.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Oklahoma Horror Story
programme.desc: Just before Thanksgiving in Oklahoma City, a husband and wife are at home when two masked gunmen allegedly ambush them and kill the husband. With few leads, police use ballistics, forensics and neighborhood gossip to solve this cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone in 90 Seconds
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old Arizona girl vanishes while waiting for an ice cream truck, it's clear she's been abducted. The search for her leads to a trail of suspects, making it the largest missing child investigation in Arizona history.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of a 14-year old girl is discovered on the beach in San Diego, CA and police think it's related to the murder of another teen. After years of mystery, a clue yields an unbelievable suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Long Island Serial Killer: The Lost Girls
programme.desc: When a vivacious young escort, Shannan Gilbert, vanishes on Long Island's south shore in 2010, her disappearance leads police to discover the bodies of ten other victims dumped by a serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Long Island Serial Killer: New Revelations
programme.desc: The discovery of four women's bodies on Gilgo Beach was just the beginning. But who is the Long Island Serial Killer? Investigators uncover multiple suspects and shocking theories, as they race to capture this prolific killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Michigan Wolverines
programme.desc: Sloth, lust, and wrath transform a homely housewife into a walking nightmare, terrorizing everyone around her and killing those in her care. And later, a lying, lazy house husband turns the perfect suburban life into a living hell.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Killer Grudge
programme.desc: A California hair stylist has it all: a loving family, a great career, and a new man who hides a dark side, but madness sparks into rage. Then, a triangle of lust, pride, and wrath will tear them apart forever.

programme.title: The Golden State Killer: It's Not Over: All I Knew Was Fear
programme.desc: He's the most prolific serial predator in California history, but remains mostly unknown. His reign of terror began in the 1970s, but the fear lingers today. Who is The Golden State Killer? Investigators past and present are committed to finding out.

programme.title: The Golden State Killer: It's Not Over: Do You Want to Die?
programme.desc: Cold case investigator Paul Holes digs deep to understand where the Golden State Killer likely lived and did for work. A chilling phone call is analyzed by the citizen sleuths to see if it adds anything to the growing profile of the perp.

programme.title: The Golden State Killer: It's Not Over: The Horror of What Happened There
programme.desc: Investigator Paul Holes continues to examine the Golden State Killer's murderous attacks in Santa Barbara. Meanwhile, armed with new theories, the citizen sleuths find a lead good enough to submit to the FBI.

programme.title: The Golden State Killer: It's Not Over: Somebody Out There Knows
programme.desc: Investigators continue to search for clues to identify the Golden State Killer. They look to new technologies in DNA to uncover their killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Albuquerque Ambush
programme.desc: Don Fluitt is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, security video captures the moments just before the evil deed and a surprising twist will bring this killer to their knees.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Frenzy
programme.desc: Billy Shuler is dead. Now, video and audio capture the detective’s desperate hunt for his killer. As the case slowly unravels, someone comes forward and identifies Billy's murderer. When the US Marshals get involved, the killer is brought to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe
programme.desc: Judith Therianos is a free-spirit; someone who very much wants to see the good in everyone. But Florida detectives unearth video surveillance that shows her utterly alone and blissfully unaware of the danger just moments before her life is cut short.

programme.title: American Monster: Sing for the Camera
programme.desc: In the summer of 2014, a peaceful community in Hartford, WI is shaken to its core when a local teenager is found dead, the victim of a brutal murder, and the second victim in two days. The community must recognize that a killer lives among them.

programme.title: American Monster: Off-Camera
programme.desc: An obsessive video blogger and mother of five shares every detail of her rollercoaster life with her husband and their children online. But one night, intruders tie her up and kidnap her husband and execute him. It seems someone has been keeping secrets.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: The Last Don
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family, and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: The Mafia's Black Sheep
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor the mob can't risk the fallout.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets

programme.title: Weaponology: SAS
programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II

programme.desc: Shop for décor and gifts from our hospitality expert!

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Changing of the Guard's Camp
programme.desc: Recently Jeff and his wife Leah inherited the cabin he grew up in from his mother but it has been dormant for nearly 10 years and needs some major repairs and upgrades.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for Future Generations
programme.desc: Mary wants the Cabin Masters to re-imagine the current footprint of the camp, and create additional bedroom/sleeping space while expanding the bathroom to accommodate their large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean Lines and Clean Water
programme.desc: A family's three daughters can't get enough of swimming, but their mom's chlorine sensitivity prevents her from joining in on the fun at the community pool. A special ozone system is installed that will allow her to swim.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Triples Infinity Edge
programme.desc: After saving for years, a couple of former teachers are splurging on the perfect pool for their new house in Austin, Texas. The nature lovers want a great view with sounds of waterfalls and space for family to visit.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Caribbean
programme.desc: After years of vacationing on the island of Roatan, a couple has decided to just build the Caribbean in their back yard. The team design a curvilinear pool with infinity edge, a sunken bar area, six water figures and a beach like they've ever built.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Rivers and a Pool
programme.desc: A couple want an alluring yard that incorporates the beauty of their cliff-side property. The enlarged yard area gets a deck bisected by a faux stream, a feature-filled pool with stone slab bridge, jumping boulders and even a slide.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Choux Shine: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally turns this old show about pate a choux into what it always should have been: an episode about chocolate eclairs. That means a new pastry cream and a chocolate glaze.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Chuck for Chuck: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' the pot roast from 2001. He's learned a lot since then, and it shows, because this is what pot roast is supposed to be.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Cantu
programme.desc: Chef Masaharu Morimoto hopes to reign supreme following his battle with Chef Homaru Cantu.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Izard Vs. Battes
programme.desc: Chef Erik Battes applies modern takes to an ancient ingredient in a battle against Iron Chef Stephanie Izard.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Brown
programme.desc: New York Chef Ed Brown enters Kitchen Stadium to take on Iron Chef Michael Symon. Will Chef Brown wow the judges with his use of the secret ingredient, or will he feel the singe of defeat to Iron Chef Symon? Tune in to see whose cuisine reigns supreme!

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli Vs. Sutherland
programme.desc: Minnesota chef Justin Sutherland brings his contemporary Southern cuisine to Kitchen Stadium in an attempt to fleece Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Thaimee
programme.desc: Bobby Flay faces off against Hong Thaimee of New York's Ngam.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian Vs. Frauneder
programme.desc: Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian faces off against Eduard Frauneder of Edi & The Wolf in N.Y.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Off the Grid
programme.desc: Go off the beaten path and visit eateries that are unknown to tourists. A rustic Italian restaurant in Staten Island, a perfect pizza in Las Vegas and a dining destination in Hawaii.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Vegas
programme.desc: You can eat at some of the most interesting, delicious and unique restaurants in Vegas.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Polynesian Paradise
programme.desc: We're taking a trip to the 50th state for an indulgent culinary weekend.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Surf, Sun and Sweets
programme.desc: Hawaii is more than just pristine beaches: it's also home to some incredible sweet treats. Lee Anne Wong serves sweet brunch specialties at Koko Head Cafe, while Via Gelato blends Hawaiian flavors with Italian techniques to make innovative frozen sweets.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Tour Of Queens
programme.desc: We venture out of New York City to the incredibly diverse borough of Queens and find one of a kind baked treats. Rudy's Bakery and CafT has been putting their own spin on classics like the German Chocolate Cake since 1934.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Donuts For Days
programme.desc: Anyway you fry it, America loves donuts, and these three shops are a cut above the rest. There are vegan delights at Donut Friend in Los Angeles, with everything from berries and mint to donut sandwiches.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Alice in Wonderland
programme.desc: Bakes go mad as they vie for $10,000 and the chance for their creation to be featured.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It's a Cake War that's 65 million years in the making, as four phenomenal cake artists battle to capture dinosaurs in cake form. Only one baker will have their creation as the centerpiece of a gigantic party and walk away with $10,000.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Travel to Las Vegas to uncover why this city is all about extremes, 100th episode.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks at the diverse and monumental eats that define Washington, DC. Full of vibrant communities, DC boasts gastronomy that includes local oysters, Ethiopian chicken stew, spicy Chinese stir-fry and chilli-smothered sausages.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tuscany
programme.desc: Andrew explores the cuisine of Tuscany, Italy, which is rooted in the tradition of 'cucina povera' or food made with local, high quality ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Our Stories: Unfinished Business: Sabrina Ionescu and Ruthy Hebard
programme.desc: The story of former Oregon basketball teammates Sabrina Ionescu and Ruthy Hebard and their four-year college journeys.

programme.title: Basketball Classics
programme.desc: Women's. 2019

programme.title: For the Culture
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the building of an exceptional 2019-20 women's basketball squad at the University of South Carolina, its iconic head coach Dawn Staley and a talented team comprised of two seniors, four returners and the top recruiting class.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful. Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots including Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb and Ms. Girlee's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love, Rose

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 'Twas the Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: The girls each plan to spend Christmas with their families but a series of strange occurrences lead them to spend Christmas together in Miami.

programme.title: Frasier: Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Death Row Confessions
programme.desc: Ted Bundy maintains his innocence. But as the clock wound down on his final death warrant, Ted Bundy made a last desperate attempt to save his own life he: began to talk.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Movie: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: A groovy spy travels back in time to stop his arch nemesis from taking over the world.

programme.title: Movie: Austin Powers in Goldmember
programme.desc: Dr. Evil teams up with a unique villain named Goldmember to take over the world by going back in time to kidnap Austin Powers' father.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: British Invasion
programme.desc: The guys cross the pond for the first-ever international episode of Impractical Jokers. Joe, Murr, Q and Sal may be up to their old tricks, but the clueless people on the receiving end of the those tricks won't be the typical 'marks' they're used to.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Panty Raid
programme.desc: The guys massage beachgoers on the boardwalk, broadcast the news from Times Square, and get their kicks teaching a karate class.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of TP
programme.desc: The guys swipe food off other diners' plates at a buffet, tutor students in foreign languages they don't speak, and try to start a dance party in a public park.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Outlaws 3
programme.desc: TruTV has rounded up another gang of the dumbest crooks the world has ever seen. This week we’ve got a literal cat burglar caught on tape, a fast food customer who asks for jail time with that and a naked guy who steals sausages.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Outlaws 4
programme.desc: A failed prison break, a thief who marks his territory, a burglar who does her best work topless, a joy ride in a cop car and a dummy who calls the fuzz on himself.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Heroes
programme.desc: Mike finds out that Sam has been kidnapped by one of her whales; Danny helps a friend avoid being deployed to Iraq. Elsewhere, Delinda learns life-altering news for she and Danny.

programme.title: Las Vegas: A Hero Ain't Nothing But a Sandwich/ Shrink Rap
programme.desc: TV icon Tom Selleck joins the crew of the Montecito as the casino's new owner, A.J. Cooper. In this two-hour season premiere, an incriminating cell phone video turns up as evidence in the murder case, and Ed tries to figure out who robbed the Montecito.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Shrink Rap
programme.desc: The Montecito is in utter chaos along with the lives of the casino staffers. The murder of Mary's father closed a chapter from her past, but leaves everyone else wondering who actually shot him.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Glass Is Always Cleaner
programme.desc: Friendships are at stake when new casino owner, A.J. Cooper, tries to make changes at the Montecito. Danny loses confidence that he will be the new president when Cooper opens the applicant search to external candidates.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Head Games
programme.desc: Cooper secures the Pacific Tropic Spokesmodel Search Contest for the Montecito, but things go awry when someone sabotages the contest. Mike tries to find the culprit, but gets distracted by the beautiful women he is protecting.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Run, Cooper, Run
programme.desc: Danny and Mike arrive at Cooper's suite for a meeting, but instead find themselves walking into a murder scene. The two question Cooper who can't remember what happened and claims he is being blackmailed.

programme.title: Las Vegas: When Life Gives You Lemon Bars
programme.desc: A look at the elite surveillance team in charge of maintaining security at a large casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Adventures in the Skin Trade
programme.desc: Danny and Mike find themselves at a local strip bar for a birthday party, but things go awry when the club owner gets physical with one of the strippers.

programme.title: Las Vegas: It's Not Easy Being Green
programme.desc: The Montecito hosts an environmentally friendly conference. When Delinda tries to go green at home, Danny puts up a fight.

programme.title: Las Vegas: My Uncle's a Gas
programme.desc: Danny finds it difficult to keep up with the job, when he gets a surprise visit from the fire marshal and his alcoholic uncle.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The High Price of Gas
programme.desc: A look at the elite surveillance team in charge of maintaining security at a large casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: A Cannon Carol
programme.desc: The casino staffers are busy making holiday plans, except Mike, who begins to doubt his place in Vegas, as well as in his friends' lives. A modern day Scrooge, Sam invites a client to come to the casino for the holidays.

programme.title: Las Vegas: I Could Eat a Horse
programme.desc: Danny and Mike head to Wyoming to buy a horse that Cooper wants to add to his ranch but this isn't as easy as they thought. Back at the casino, Delinda tries to find a new chef for the restaurant.

programme.title: Las Vegas: 3 Babies, 100 Guns and a Fat Chick
programme.desc: When a fugitive arrives at the Montecito, FBI agents and bounty hunters hope to make a capture. Mike, Danny and Cooper step in, and end up fighting for their lives. Also, Piper throws a post-New Year's Eve party.

programme.title: Las Vegas: 3 Babies, 100 Guns and a Fat Chick
programme.desc: When a fugitive arrives at the Montecito, FBI agents and bounty hunters hope to make a capture. Mike, Danny and Cooper step in, and end up fighting for their lives. Also, Piper throws a post-New Year's Eve party.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Secrets, Lies and Lamaze
programme.desc: Piper gets himself in trouble with the gaming commission, but Cooper bails her out to the tune of $1-million, making the staffers suspicious of his actions. Sam and manicurist Polly get caught speeding and sentenced to traffic school.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast
programme.desc: Sam helps her 'whales' destroy any evidence that they went to a strip club. Meanwhile, Mike and Piper try to lure a hot new bartender to work at the Montecito. Elsewhere, Cooper challenges Danny to find ways to bring in more clientele.

programme.title: Las Vegas: 2 on 2
programme.desc: Piper's skills are put to the test when she is nominated for the 'Concierge of the Year' award. Meanwhile, Danny and Mike find themselves in over their heads upon entering a 2 on 2-basketball competition.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Win, Place, Bingo
programme.desc: Cooper, Danny and Mike are suspicious of a guy named Pete Skinner who is betting on horses and has a seemingly perfect winning streak. Meanwhile, Sam's 'whale' brings his grandmother 'Robby' with him to the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Three Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Danny, Piper and Mitch are taken hostage when thieves attempt to steal a rare stamp that is up for auction at the Montecito. During an unexpected dinner with Cooper, Delinda takes the opportunity to try to get to know the mysterious owner.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Three Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Danny, Piper and Mitch are taken hostage when thieves attempt to steal a rare stamp that is up for auction at the Montecito. During an unexpected dinner with Cooper, Delinda takes the opportunity to try to get to know the mysterious owner.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Lin-Manuel Miranda discusses 'Hamilton' and supporting Black Lives Matter.

programme.title: Botched: Here Comes Tummy Boo Hoo
programme.desc: In the season finale, Dr. Nassif helps a fellow Lebanese patient get the nose she wants in time for her wedding, Dr. Dubrow attempts to fix a woman's strip mall boob job, and Mama June from 'Honey Boo Boo' fame needs a fupa lift.

programme.title: Botched: The Real Boobs of New Jersey
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a New Jersey Housewife's agitated breasts, while Dr. Nassif tackles a car-wrecked twin's twisted nose. A plastic surgery fanatic with the butt seen around the world needs his nose fixed so he can reach his own plastic perfection.

programme.title: Botched: All Twerk and No Play
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a woman with boobs gone bad get her sexy back and a bodybuilder get back in the gym. Later, the doctors offer advice to a patient on her cheeky trans-formation.

programme.title: Botched: Boob Trains and Big Butts
programme.desc: Paul and Terry help former music video vixen Tawny Kitaen get off the boob train. Later a heart shaped nose that gives love a bad name is treated and meet a Brazilian doll that wants a bigger butt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Legends of Texas
programme.desc: Guy is cruising the lone star state for a bite of Texas style triple d. From gumbo to Greek, pizza to burgers, and tasty twists from Dallas to Houston.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Late Night Legends
programme.desc: Guy explores how joints across America have a special way of keeping us up late and serving outrageous food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Top Ten Burgers
programme.desc: Guy's had a lot of burgers on DDD and we asked you to vote for your Top 10 favourites of all time. From old school to gourmet, it's a countdown of the most creative and delicious combinations found in Flavortown.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Beaten Path
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's taking a detour to find some not-your-everyday eats. In Richmond, Va., a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavour.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cosmopolitan Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing all kinds of cosmopolitan comfort food. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, a righteous joint puts a New England spin on corned beef and cabbage, plus a fresh take on stroganoff.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Culinary Games
programme.desc: The recruits participate in the first annual boot camp culinary games and compete in culinary-related events, from whipping cream to stomping tomatoes. They are then taught how to roll sushi and then make traditional Japanese bento boxes.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Beat Bobby Flay: The Musical
programme.desc: Things get lyrical in the kitchen when Food Network's Damaris Phillips gets TV host Jaymee Sire to join her sing-along that doesn't end, much to Bobby Flay's annoyance.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Eye Of The Tiger
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli and Eddie Jackson keep an eagle eye on Nashville chef Dale Levitski and Indian-born Manish Tyagi. The competitors bring their best as they vie for the chance to sink their claws into Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Every Girl
programme.desc: The success of Trisha Yearwood's single, 'Every Girl in This Town', is an incredible career milestone, so Trisha cooks some recipes that remind her of some of the other most-memorable moments in her career.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood brings the American county fair tradition to her own backyard. She prepares tasty fairground favourites before her neighbourhood friends and their kids come by to join the fun.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Build-Your-Own-Brunch Party
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood takes brunch to the next level by hosting a "BYOB" -- Build-Your-Own-Brunch party! She uses some of her favorite Mexican-themed dishes to create an epic food and beverage buffet for her friends to enjoy.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Nothing Beats Barbecue Chicken
programme.desc: Michael grills up a feast of summertime staples, starting with barbecue chicken slathered in a Kansas City-style sauce. Then he gives coleslaw a twist by adding pickles, mint leaves and poppy seed while Liz makes a Kentucky mule cocktail.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fireworks of Flavor
programme.desc: Fourth of July is sparkling with fireworks of flavour from Sunny Anderson's steak supreme to Jeff Mauro's cheesy and spicy Reuben-style brats. Katie Lee makes grilled firework onion appetizers and Michael Symon grills blueberry BBQ chicken.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Patriotic Party
programme.desc: The Kitchen's Patriotic Party kicks off with Jeff Mauro's GYOB 'Grind Your Own Beef' Short Rib Burger with Dijoli and new ways to Flavor Bomb condiments. Then, Katie Lee and Sunny Anderson take hot dogs to the next level.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Family Style: Summertime Faves With a Twist

programme.title: Chopped: Waffles for the Win
programme.desc: The judges have a pressing matter to discuss with four lucky chefs: waffles. The competitors prove waffles are no longer just for breakfast by making them the star of every plate and every round.

programme.title: Chopped: Cake Walk?
programme.desc: The chefs find carrot cake in the first basket, along with an unusual seafood product. In the entree round, the competitors take three different approaches with a familiar protein.

programme.title: Chopped: Fabulous Baker Boys
programme.desc: You can put all your bread on a bet that a baker is going to take the $10,000 prize in this competition. In the first round, the competitors must bake focaccia and figure out how to make a rich fish work with rice pudding.

programme.desc: In July 2010, ESPN aired 'The Decision,' a live special in which LeBron James, the biggest NBA free agent ever, announced he was leaving Cleveland for Miami. The criticism was massive. Don Van Natta Jr. explores the far-reaching impact.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Glen vs Wild
programme.desc: In this special episode of North Woods Law, Sergeant Glen Lucas walks through some of his most memorable cases while also providing insight into what was happening behind the scenes. Cases include his car accident, memorable hunting cases, and more.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Texas game wardens protect the natural resources of their vast state while fighting crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Best Animal Encounters
programme.desc: This special episode highlights the New Hampshire Conservation Officer's most exciting interactions with the state's wildlife, including encounters with bears, moose, hawks, fawns, skunks and the endangered timber rattlesnake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Justice: Operation: Wildlife
programme.desc: An orphaned squirrel kit is rescued by Game Warden Gould, while Warden Cook heads to the beach to investigate the mysterious death of a tiger shark. Then, a pesky gator is caught and relocated, and Warden Powell examines a man's vicious deer encounter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Justice: Drugs, Deers and Turtles
programme.desc: Game Warden Johnson joins forces with local law enforcement to arrest a well-known drug addicted poacher. An illegal discovery is made when stopping a man for crabbing, and Warden Boone responds to a call about an aggressive alligator snapping turtle.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Owl Gone Bad
programme.desc: It's the opening of deer and oyster season in Texas. On the Gulf, Game Wardens find illegal undersized oysters. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps. An owl is rescued from a chicken coop and set free.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Best Animal Encounters
programme.desc: This special episode highlights the New Hampshire Conservation Officer's most exciting interactions with the state's wildlife, including encounters with bears, moose, hawks, fawns, skunks and the endangered timber rattlesnake.

programme.desc: An orphaned squirrel kit is rescued by Game Warden Gould, while Warden Cook heads to the beach to investigate the mysterious death of a tiger shark. Then, a pesky gator is caught and relocated, and Warden Powell examines a man's vicious deer encounter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Texas Justice: Drugs, Deers and Turtles
programme.desc: Game Warden Johnson joins forces with local law enforcement to arrest a well-known drug addicted poacher. An illegal discovery is made when stopping a man for crabbing, and Warden Boone responds to a call about an aggressive alligator snapping turtle.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator vs. Dog
programme.desc: Dove season starts off with a bang, keeping wardens across the state busy from sunrise to sundown. Texas Game Wardens must relocate a 500-lb gator that's loose in a suburban area. Wardens uncover a large marijuana grow-op hidden in a wildlife preserve.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Glen vs Wild
programme.desc: In this special episode of North Woods Law, Sergeant Glen Lucas walks through some of his most memorable cases while also providing insight into what was happening behind the scenes. Cases include his car accident, memorable hunting cases, and more.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Best Animal Encounters
programme.desc: This special episode highlights the New Hampshire Conservation Officer's most exciting interactions with the state's wildlife, including encounters with bears, moose, hawks, fawns, skunks and the endangered timber rattlesnake.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Lair of the River Wolf
programme.desc: The crew travels to Mongolia in search of taimen: the largest, most ferocious member of the salmon family. Reaching their target will involve a punishing combination of back-breaking mountain trails, treacherous rivers and uncooperative Mongolian horses.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Don't Lose Your Head
programme.desc: The Mahseer has been fished almost to extinction. Its last stronghold may be in the jungles of Borneo, an area controlled by the headhunting Dayak people. The boys will need to risk life, limb and maybe their heads to find if this rumor is true.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Big Bad Bonefish
programme.desc: Lake Windsor on Inagua Island is home to a mystery. How did giant ocean-dwelling fish get into a lake with no natural inlet or outlet? The Fish or Die team journeys to the tropics to investigate the mystery and hopefully catch some world-class bonefish.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Eye of the Tigerfish
programme.desc: The guys head deep into Zambia, chasing reports of large tigerfish - a fierce freshwater predator - in an uncharted river. The only thing standing in their way is 400 miles of unpaved roads, crocodiles, hippos and a serious lack of fuel.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four friends begin a challenging jungle expedition in search of a giant golden dorado, possibly dwelling within a remote Bolivian river. To find their way there, they must conquer torrential rains, vicious insects and isolated tribes.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Amazon Giant
programme.desc: The Arapaima is the largest scaled freshwater fish in the world and considered the ultimate jungle catch. The crew heads to one of the most remote and inhospitable jungles of Ecuador to try and land one of these living dinosaurs.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Tanana's Test
programme.desc: Stan and Pat race to prepare Tanana to be a checkpoint for the Iditarod dog sled race. Charlie and Bob hunt a grizzly that has been terrorizing a miner's camp. Joe trains his new dog, hoping to turn him into a hunting partner.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Nations and Charlie have a confrontation over rights to a family trapline. Stan and Kathleen try to upgrade Tozi cabin, but get more than they bargained for. The Moore's kennel is on the line as Courtney and Nations race in the Yukon River Championship.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Blood on Their Hands
programme.desc: After a poor trapping season, Charlie Wright teams up with Stan Zuray in a last-ditch effort to catch beaver. Stan and Joe Zuray discover a large predator has been stealing from their trapline. James Roberts teaches his two sons the importance of hunting.

programme.title: Yukon Men: All In
programme.desc: Unseasonably thin ice prevents villagers from reaching valuable hunting grounds, forcing Stan and Charlie to carve a new path through the rugged Alaskan wilderness in search of food. Desperate to provide for his family, James takes a huge risk.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Winter's Child
programme.desc: As winter approaches The Kilchers prepare to welcome a new member to their unique family.

programme.title: The Greatest Moments in BET Awards History

programme.title: BET Awards
programme.desc: Nominees reflect an abundance of creative expression and Black excellence across music, TV, film, sports, and philanthropy. Drake leads the pack with six nominations, while newcomers Megan Thee Stallion and Roddy Ricch garnered five nominations each.

programme.desc: The team analyzes what secrets could be in the hands of a terrorist targeting the navy when a high-tech bug is found inside a probationary agent's tooth. Meanwhile, the festivities for Jimmy Palmer's upcoming wedding continue with a bachelor party.

programme.title: Family Guy: Regarding Carter
programme.desc: Lois receives a surprising birthday present from her father, Carter Pewterschmidt, that leads to an unfortunate accident leaving him dependent on Lois and the Griffin’s care.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pawtucket Pete
programme.desc: The Pawtucket Brewery hires new bosses, who decide to change the company's mascot. In an attempt to be crowned the new face of Pawtucket Ale, Peter and Brian go head-to-head.

programme.title: Family Guy: Con Heiress
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian compete for the inheritance of a wealthy, older heiress. Meanwhile, Peter and Chris battle for Mr. Herbert's affection.

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer
programme.desc: Brian meets and quickly falls in love with a woman named Jess, who reveals she has cancer. After she receives devastating news regarding her diagnosis, Brian proposes marriage to her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: Brian's marriage to Jess is not what he envisioned, especially after her miraculous recovery from cancer. At the suggestion of Peter, Brian lets himself go, causing Jess to make a surprising decision.

programme.title: Family Guy: Stand by Meg

programme.title: Family Guy: The Griffin Winter Games
programme.desc: To the surprise of all the Griffins, Meg makes the U.S. Olympic team as a biathlete and competes in the Winter Olympics.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pal Stewie

programme.title: The Simpsons: Much Apu About Nothing
programme.desc: After an increase in taxes, an anti-immigration fever hits Springfield. Apu turns to the Simpson family and gets Homer's 'help' in preparing for his citizenship test.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerpalooza
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with trying to appear 'cool' in front of his kids and their friends. While attending the Lollapalooza music festival, Homer inadvertently becomes a popular sideshow act when he gets hit in the stomach by a cannonball.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: What About Blob?
programme.desc: Gene convinces Tina and Louise to help him save a misunderstood plankton blob from being destroyed by a yacht club.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: If You Love It So Much, Why Don't You Marionette?
programme.desc: The kids visit a marionette theater for a school field trip and Louise gets on the theater owner's bad side. Meanwhile, Bob takes pity on a flyer guy who's handing out flyers in front of the restaurant.

programme.title: Movie: Downsizing
programme.desc: After a company develops a way to shrink people to a fraction of their normal size as a means of combating overpopulation, a husband and wife decide to go through with the procedure, but discover that the little life isn't everything that was promised.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Inside Puppy Mills
programme.desc: In this powerful episode, Cesar sees puppy mill horror and works to rescue and rehabilitate caged pups with the animal rights group Last Chance for Animals (LCA).

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Afraid of the Bark
programme.desc: Suzie fears she has hit a wall with her Doberman, who is afraid of practically any sort of noise. She needs Cesar's expertise to bring this dodging Doberman back to being a real dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Saving Ryan
programme.desc: A couple are at a loss to end their pug's fighting. A terrier attacks it's owner's son at the ankles and steals his blanket. A five-legged dog is out of control.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Run Home Roscoe!
programme.desc: Roscoe refuses to go outside the family's property and has several fear issues. Can Cesar teach Roscoe to overcome his fears and go on a walk?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Revved-Up Harley
programme.desc: Memphis, a Weimaraner with an insatiable appetite, needs to learn how to eat healthier by not eating everything in sight! Harley is an uncontrollable Yellow lab who loves to hump and dig up the lawn. Cesar hopes he can calm this revved up Harley!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Money Barks
programme.desc: The animals of Isabella County are getting antsy after such a long winter and they’re up to more trouble than usual.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Slop, Drop and Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol certainly has a lot on his plate when a pit-bull is in for emergency surgery, a pair of pups run into a prickly porcupine, and Smoke the pet pig is attacked.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: It's Raining Hen
programme.desc: Popeye the therapy rabbit comes into Pol Clinic with overgrown teeth but leaves with a couple of dates when his owner, Jodi, persuades Dr. Pol to donate dinner with himself and Diane for a fundraiser.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Ruff Day at the Office
programme.desc: It’s ready, set, VET as Dr. Pol and the other vets race to take on emergency after emergency in one frantic Friday.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Chubby Bunny
programme.desc: The Pol Clinic is packed to the gills with a mini-pig, giant bunny, pregnant dog and a busted hen.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Rise of a Superpower
programme.desc: Explorers uncover evidence that supports the legend of a lost civilization in the Amazon.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Rise of a Superpower
programme.desc: Explorers uncover evidence that supports the legend of a lost civilization in the Amazon.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: California's Megaquake
programme.desc: Rob Nelson heads to California to investigate a network for major fault lines that could set off an unprecedented mega-quake. Then, he explores a mysterious sinkhole that some believe is an endless pit to the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Tesla's Final Secrets
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla died before he finished a mysterious, earth-shattering invention, but the ground beneath his only remaining lab might hold clues. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns are the first to use cutting-edge tech to investigate Tesla's underground secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: American Stonehenge
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious pattern of rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. At the notorious Alcatraz prison, Rob uses state-of-the-art technology in search of rumored escape tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Mercury
programme.desc: Mercury is a deadly world, facing attacks from the Sun, comets, and other planets, and even though it's the smallest planet in our solar system, it has a dangerous secret a dangerous secret that might one day threaten life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Are Black Holes Real?
programme.desc: New discoveries challenge everything we know about black holes, and astronomers question if they even exist; the latest science tries to explain how they work and what they look like.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When NASA Met Jupiter
programme.desc: NASA's Juno spacecraft is part of a cutting-edge mission to explore the mysteries of Jupiter. As this mighty probe is pummeled with deadly radiation, it gathers new data that could change everything we know about the solar system's biggest planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: American Monster: Smoke Gets in Your Eyes
programme.desc: When a devastating fire at the Kohnle family home leaves a family member dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. As the evidence mounts up, it's the testimony of two young kids who lead the police to decipher if it was an accident, suicide or murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Don't Forget Me
programme.desc: On the day before he's to start a new job, a father-of-two disappears with no warning. His wife has no idea where he went. His friends hint that he led a secret, sordid life. But it remains a mystery for years - until a tip reveals the jaw-dropping truth.

programme.title: American Monster: The Green Monster
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, an intruder brutally guns down Jack and Linda Myers in their sleep. The only witness is their sleepy 4-year-old grandson. But their extensive home movies - aired here for the first time - may have captured a monster lurking in their midst.

programme.title: American Monster: An Open Relationship
programme.desc: Brent Cotta's popular wife, Cassie, has mysteriously disappeared on New Year's Eve in Fort Smith, Arkansas. When family and friends conduct a search, the discovery of a shallow grave soon leads to the horrific truth emerging.

programme.title: American Monster: Body Type
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Texts, Lies, and Videotape
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears, a series of text messages from her phone lead police to believe she left on her own. Then, her family uncovers evidence that she may have actually been the victim of foul play.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Wedding Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A young woman getting ready to be a bridesmaid at her best friend's wedding is found viciously stabbed to death in her own home.

programme.title: American Monster: Body Type
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Texts, Lies, and Videotape
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears, a series of text messages from her phone lead police to believe she left on her own. Then, her family uncovers evidence that she may have actually been the victim of foul play.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Unchecked Violence
programme.desc: When a senior at Ohio State University goes missing, it marks the beginning of a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: American Monster: Don't Forget Me
programme.desc: On the day before he's to start a new job, a father-of-two disappears with no warning. His wife has no idea where he went. His friends hint that he led a secret, sordid life. But it remains a mystery for years - until a tip reveals the jaw-dropping truth.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Single mom Christina Sanoubane, leaves Jacob Crosson, her abusive boyfriend and father of her two year old son Corbin, to move into her own apartment. But four days later when a friend comes to visit her, Corbin greets him with the words: 'Mommy's dead.'

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Sensing Secrets
programme.desc: Young mother of three Christine Sheddy is trying to put her life back on track after tragedy and heartbreak. But just when she's on the verge of a fresh start, she disappears without a trace and every person in her life becomes a suspect.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Handful of Coins
programme.desc: When a loving mother is found gunned down just steps from her front door, police in her small town are baffled. As the investigation unfolded, a sense of confusion would quickly boil into outrage.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Connected by Murder
programme.desc: Three terrifying murders are connected together by one common thread. After years of frustration and heartbreak, three investigators, from three different states, must work together to solve the crimes.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Twisted Lies
programme.desc: A mother of four is found handcuffed and murdered in the passenger seat of her car.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Landlord, Death Lord
programme.desc: A young couple finds their paradise in a Vancouver, Washington housing development with strict codes of community conduct. But someone forgot to tell their neighbour the rules, and he will resist them at all costs.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Red Picket Fences
programme.desc: The Phillips' family moves to a quiet seafront town in Maine to escape a crime wave in Indiana. But their dream home comes with a not so dreamy ex-military neighbor. A barrage of gunfire between the houses one night shatters both families forever.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: There Bleeds the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A friendship between two Ohio neighbours begins as peaceful, but over time descends into rancor and violence, ending in a bloody battle.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Home Bloody Home
programme.desc: The town of Toulon, Illinois, is a tight knit community, except for the local bully who everyone avoids. When his neighbours stand up to him after his dog bites their son, he nurses a decade long grudge that finally explodes in violent frenzy.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Almost Home
programme.desc: Gayle Isleib was shot on April 30, 1996. Police identify a co-worker, Tyronne Montgomery. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap Gayle, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. Tyrone Montgomery was convicted of 1st degree Murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.
